spec.description: CATSP OS — The Operating System for Zambia's Agricultural Transformation

site.description: Interactive presentation site — 7 pages reflecting full v0.5 spec content

handshake.note: Full section with sacred rule callout + DualSignature SVG diagram.

attestation.note: Full section with example table (5 types) + corroboration explanation.

function.note: Full section with 3 dimensions + capability registry table (8 modules).

organisation.note: Full section with hierarchy visualization + affiliations note.

forward_contract.note: Full section with governance vote + ForwardLifecycle SVG diagram.

payment_waterfall.note: Full section with 6-line priority + InsuranceFlow SVG diagram.

forward_contracts.note: Full schema. Discovery mechanism is OPEN.

quality_attestations.note: Via attestation primitive. Grading standards defined.

payment_waterfall.note: Priority order fixed. Async state machine OPEN. Escrow architecture OPEN. Minimum farmer floor OPEN.

trust_scores.note: Full schema. Weights configurable per org_type. Volume-weighted.

cluster_governance.note: Treasury, proposals, voting, constitution, right to exit. Declining quorum OPEN.

saff_loans.note: Schema complete. Bank API integration OPEN.

access_control.note: Capability-based RLS. Performance at scale OPEN.

audit_integrity.note: Append-only audit log, anomaly flags, Merkle tree. Publication target OPEN. Anomaly engine algorithms OPEN.

extension_partners.note: Assignments, attestation-based tracking, issue flags, early warnings.

authentication.note: Google OAuth + SIM OTP + mobile money binding.

notifications.note: Referenced throughout but no infrastructure designed.

offline_sync.note: Rural connectivity assumed online. PWA offline not specified.

ussd_flows.note: Critical for feature phone users. No flow diagrams or session design.

api_endpoints.note: Data models defined but no REST/GraphQL endpoint specs.

settlement_escrow.summary: Who holds money between handshake trigger and waterfall execution? Bank-escrow vs platform-escrow vs processor-direct.
settlement_escrow.blocked_by: Bank API conversations, possibly BoZ regulatory guidance

contract_discovery.summary: Clusters can't find posted contracts without notification and browse mechanism.

waterfall_state_machine.summary: Payment failure handling underspecified — partial settlements, retries, reconciliation.

waterfall_farmer_floor.summary: Deductions could exceed gross payment, leaving farmer with zero.
waterfall_farmer_floor.blocked_by: Design decision needed: minimum percentage floor, pro-rata reduction, or flag-and-halt

notification_system.summary: SMS/USSD notifications referenced throughout but no infrastructure designed.
notification_system.blocked_by: Table design, message templates, channel routing, SMS gateway integration

offline_connectivity.summary: Rural Zambia has unreliable connectivity; all operations assume online.
offline_connectivity.blocked_by: PWA offline storage spec, sync-when-connected, conflict resolution

bank_api_integration.summary: SAFF documentation generation has no delivery target.

anomaly_engine.summary: Anomaly triggers listed but algorithms/thresholds not specified.
anomaly_engine.blocked_by: Edge Function specs for each trigger

merkle_publication.summary: Root hash computed but no external publication mechanism.
merkle_publication.blocked_by: Decision on IPFS / public chain / government endpoint / public feed

declining_quorum.summary: If cluster voting quorum never reached, contracts expire.
declining_quorum.blocked_by: Field testing to decide: lower quorum threshold or leader-acts-with-challenge-window

rls_performance.summary: Capability checks on every query may be slow with 40,000+ users.

api_boundaries.summary: Spec defines data models but not API endpoints.

ussd_flows.summary: USSD critical for feature phone users but no flow diagrams.
ussd_flows.blocked_by: Complete USSD session spec: menu trees, state management, SMS fallback

phase_0.label: Proof of Concept
phase_0.scope: 1 processor, 1 depot, 1 cluster, 1 supplier. Manual payments.

phase_1.label: Pilot
phase_1.scope: 10 clusters, 2 depots, 2 processors. Automated waterfall, SAFF, insurance.

phase_2.label: Scale
phase_2.scope: National + cross-border (DRC, Angola). Full ZATTF integration.

phase_3.label: International Capital
phase_3.scope: Tokenised forwards. Tradeable warehouse receipts. Requires BoZ/SEC framework.
